%% branded.tex — Pandoc LaTeX template for DocsifyTemplate
%% Brand colors and component environments match the web theme.
%% Usage: pandoc -f markdown -t latex --template=branded.tex

\documentclass[11pt, a4paper]{article}

%% ── Packages ──
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[margin=2.5cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{etoolbox}

\tcbuselibrary{skins, breakable}

%% ── Brand Colors (from theme.css :root) ──
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{0891B2}
\definecolor{accentlight}{HTML}{ECFEFF}
\definecolor{accenttext}{HTML}{0E7490}
\definecolor{surfacepage}{HTML}{FAF9F7}
\definecolor{surfaceraised}{HTML}{F5F5F4}
\definecolor{bordersubtle}{HTML}{E7E5E4}
\definecolor{textprimary}{HTML}{1C1917}
\definecolor{textsecondary}{HTML}{44403C}
\definecolor{textmuted}{HTML}{A8A29E}
\definecolor{techaccent}{HTML}{6366F1}
\definecolor{success}{HTML}{34D399}

%% Method colors
\definecolor{methodget}{HTML}{3B82F6}
\definecolor{methodpost}{HTML}{22C55E}
\definecolor{methodput}{HTML}{F59E0B}
\definecolor{methodpatch}{HTML}{F97316}
\definecolor{methoddelete}{HTML}{EF4444}

%% ── Hyperref ──
\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=accenttext,
  urlcolor=accent,
  citecolor=accent,
  pdfborder={0 0 0}
}

%% ── Header / Footer ──
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\textcolor{textmuted}{\small $if(title)$$title$$else$Documentation$endif$}}
\fancyhead[R]{\textcolor{accent}{\small\textbf{DocsifyTemplate}}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\textcolor{textmuted}{\small\thepage}}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{bordersubtle}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

%% ── Listings styles ──
\lstdefinestyle{code}{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  backgroundcolor=\color{surfaceraised},
  frame=single,
  rulecolor=\color{bordersubtle},
  breaklines=true,
  numbers=left,
  numberstyle=\tiny\color{textmuted},
  numbersep=8pt,
  tabsize=2,
  showstringspaces=false,
  keywordstyle=\color{techaccent}\bfseries,
  stringstyle=\color{accenttext},
  commentstyle=\color{textmuted}\itshape,
}

\lstdefinestyle{response}{
  basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
  backgroundcolor=\color{surfaceraised},
  frame=single,
  rulecolor=\color{bordersubtle},
  breaklines=true,
  tabsize=2,
  showstringspaces=false,
}

\lstset{style=code}

%% ── Custom commands ──
\newcommand{\required}{{\textcolor{methoddelete}{\footnotesize\textbf{required}}}}
\newcommand{\typebadge}[1]{{\footnotesize\colorbox{surfaceraised}{\texttt{#1}}}}
\newcommand{\asyncbadge}{{\textcolor{techaccent}{\footnotesize\textbf{async}}}}
\newcommand{\syncbadge}{{\textcolor{accent}{\footnotesize\textbf{sync}}}}

%% ── Component environments ──

% Card Grid
\newenvironment{cardgrid}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable]%
}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}
\newcommand{\card}[3]{%  #1=icon #2=title #3=description
  \noindent\textbf{#1\enspace#2}\\
  {\small\textcolor{textsecondary}{#3}}\\[0.6em]%
}

% Entity Schema
\newenvironment{entityschema}[1]{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=accent, title={\textbf{#1}}, fonttitle=\large, coltitle=white, colbacktitle=accent, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable, left=2mm, right=2mm]%
}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

% API Endpoint
\newcommand{\methodcolor}[1]{%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{GET}{\colorbox{methodget!15}{\textcolor{methodget}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{POST}{\colorbox{methodpost!15}{\textcolor{methodpost}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{PUT}{\colorbox{methodput!15}{\textcolor{methodput}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{PATCH}{\colorbox{methodpatch!15}{\textcolor{methodpatch}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
  \ifstrequal{#1}{DELETE}{\colorbox{methoddelete!15}{\textcolor{methoddelete}{\textbf{\small #1}}}}{}%
}

\newenvironment{apiendpoint}[2]{%  #1=METHOD #2=path
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable, left=3mm]%
  \methodcolor{#1}\enspace{\ttfamily\textbf{#2}}\\[0.5em]%
}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

% Status Flow
\newenvironment{statusflow}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=bordersubtle, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable]%
  \begin{center}%
}{%
  \end{center}%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}
\newcommand{\state}[5]{%  #1=label #2=trigger #3=next #4=effects #5=arrow
  \fcolorbox{accent}{accentlight}{\textbf{#1}}%
  #5%
}

% Step Type
\newenvironment{steptype}[2]{%  #1=name #2=badge
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=white, colframe=accent!50, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt, breakable, title={\textbf{#1}\enspace#2}, coltitle=textprimary, colbacktitle=accentlight]%
}{%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

% Annotation list
\newenvironment{annotationlist}{%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
  \begin{description}[style=nextline, font=\normalfont\small\textcolor{accent}]%
}{%
  \end{description}%
}
\newcommand{\annotation}[2]{%  #1=line number #2=text
  \item[\tikz\node[circle, fill=accent, text=white, inner sep=1.5pt, font=\tiny\bfseries]{#1};] {\small #2}%
}

% Side by Side
\newenvironment{sidebyside}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \noindent%
}{%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

% Mermaid placeholder
\newenvironment{mermaidplaceholder}{%
  \vspace{1em}%
  \begin{tcolorbox}[colback=surfaceraised, colframe=textmuted, arc=4pt, boxrule=0.5pt]%
  \textcolor{textmuted}{\small\textit{[Mermaid diagram — render separately]}}\\[0.3em]%
  {\ttfamily\scriptsize%
}{%
  }%
  \end{tcolorbox}%
  \vspace{0.5em}%
}

%% ── Title setup ──
$if(title)$
\title{%
  {\textcolor{accent}{\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}}}\\[1em]%
  {\Huge\textbf{\textcolor{textprimary}{$title$}}}\\[0.5em]%
  $if(subtitle)${\Large\textcolor{textsecondary}{$subtitle$}}\\[0.5em]$endif$%
  {\textcolor{accent}{\rule{\textwidth}{2pt}}}%
}
$endif$
$if(author)$\author{$author$}$endif$
\date{$if(date)$$date$$else$\today$endif$}

%% ── Document ──
\begin{document}

$if(title)$
\maketitle
\thispagestyle{empty}
\newpage
$endif$

$if(toc)$
\tableofcontents
\newpage
$endif$

$body$

\end{document}
